description_long: This doll is designed in the style of a LEGO minifigure, featuring a cylindrical head and blocky limbs. The head is a solid light brown color, lacking any facial features. The torso is decorated with a mint green upper section adorned with scattered green spots, transitioning into a lavender band with small purple dots, resembling an ice cream or dessert theme. The arms are mint green with a dotted texture, and the hands are a light lavender color. The legs are patterned with a crisscross brown and tan design, mimicking a waffle cone, further reinforcing the dessert motif. The overall appearance is playful and stylized, suitable for imaginative play in urban or park settings.
description: A LEGO-style doll with a dessert-themed outfit, featuring a mint green and lavender top and waffle-patterned legs. The head is plain light brown, and the arms and hands are pastel-colored.
description_view_0: The back of the doll shows the mint green and lavender torso with green spots and purple dots, and the waffle-patterned legs. Both arms are extended outward.
description_view_1: A side profile of the doll, highlighting the cylindrical head, the thickness of the arms, and the layered torso design.
description_view_2: The front of the doll displays the full dessert-themed torso, plain head, and the detailed waffle pattern on the legs. Both arms are visible and extended.
description_view_3: The opposite side profile, mirroring view 1, with the same emphasis on the arm and torso thickness.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll wears a mint green long-sleeve top with scattered green spots, a lavender band with purple dots resembling melting ice cream, and brown-tan legs with a waffle cone pattern. The style is playful and dessert-themed, reminiscent of novelty or food-inspired fashion.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with both arms extended horizontally to the sides, legs straight and parallel, and the head facing forward. The pose is static and symmetrical.
attribute_facial_expression: No facial features or expression are present; the head is completely plain.
attribute_hair_style: No hair is present; the head is smooth and unadorned.
